mapper.select: SELECT vehicle_id, route_no, vehicle_type, status, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM created_at) * 1000 AS created_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM updated_at) * 1000 AS updated_at, updated_by FROM hd_bus_vehicle ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT vehicle_id, route_no, vehicle_type, status, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM created_at) * 1000 AS created_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM updated_at) * 1000 AS updated_at, updated_by FROM hd_bus_vehicle WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hd_bus_vehicle (vehicle_id, route_no, vehicle_type, status, updated_by) VALUES (#{vehicleId}, #{routeNo}, #{vehicleType}, #{status}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE hd_bus_vehicle SET route_no = #{routeNo}, vehicle_type = #{vehicleType}, status = #{status}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId}
